title: azalea lateritia
intro: Azalea lateritia, also known as the fragrant azalea or later flowering azalea, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the heath family and is native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Azalea lateritia include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting respiratory health, as well as having antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Azalea lateritia can be prepared as an herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, or used in tincture or capsule form to harness its medicinal properties.
